name: Serrik Dhal
rank: Guildmaster — Head of the Iron Fang Consortium
sd_appearance: A gaunt human of average height, skin pallid as ash, iron-grey hair cropped short with a military buzzcut, eyes sharp and pale gold despite the hollow, fading flesh around them. Wears a deep burgundy coat lined with gunmetal scales, the Iron Fang mark etched faintly into the lapel, over worn leather and chainmail bearing the patina of decades of contracts. A rust-stained warhammer hangs at his side, its blade dulled by countless strikes, and a crossbow slung across his back, its stock cracked and stained with old blood, while his hands tremble faintly as he grips a rusted iron ring carved with forgotten sigils.
faction_visual: deep burgundy and gunmetal coat, Iron Fang mark subtle on lapel, always armed
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
